pathways.name: Provenance & lineage
pathways.meaning: Track origin, custody, and derivation of governance-relevant signals.

pathways.name: Identity integrity
pathways.meaning: Assure actor identity, role validity, and attestation integrity.

pathways.name: Runtime arbitration
pathways.meaning: Adjudicate conflicts between obligations, claims, and constraints.

pathways.name: Relational dependency
pathways.meaning: Manage dependencies and cross-domain coupling between runtime components.

pathways.name: Crisis response
pathways.meaning: Define emergency execution posture and exceptional governance controls.

pathways.name: Economic extraction
pathways.meaning: Address value transfer, fee extraction, and distribution fairness.

pathways.name: Platform legitimacy
pathways.meaning: Maintain constitutional validity and perceived institutional trust.

pathways.name: Synthetic labour
pathways.meaning: Govern automated agent work, synthetic tasks, and delegation boundaries.

pathways.name: Security boundaries
pathways.meaning: Enforce access boundaries, permissions, and containment.

pathways.name: Observability & telemetry
pathways.meaning: Ensure runtime actions are auditable, measurable, and reviewable.
